# Smarter Justice

Smarter Justice is a private support service for legal, tax, benefits, government-form, business-compliance, and professional-review starting help. It is not a law firm and not the government. It helps users ask starting questions, upload documents/notices, organize files, identify possible concerns that may need review, and recommend Human Review Specialist, attorney, tax professional, tax attorney, CPA/enrolled-agent/accountant, or other qualified professional review when appropriate. Official government forms are often free from the government. No outcomes are guaranteed.

Version 1.0.6 adds website polish and conversion readiness: a step-by-step homepage start flow, simpler top navigation, stronger Upload Notice entry points, focused practice landing pages for high-value areas, clearer pricing, improved dashboard empty states, staff workbench filtering polish, friendly error summaries, visible focus/accessibility improvements, improved Spanish public-copy foundation, and stronger trust/disclaimer blocks. It preserves paid-pilot storage improvements, optional Postgres-backed persistence, SMTP scaffolding, Stripe Checkout/webhook foundation, review packages, form-draft starter packages, and the verified-form-path registry. First verified paths are review-first and do not claim full autonomous official-form completion.

Important public pages: /upload-notice.html for notice-first starts, /pricing.html for simple paid options, /practice-areas.html for all 69 practice areas, /forms-roadmap.html for form readiness levels, /review-delivery.html for paid deliverables, and /production-readiness.html for paid-user readiness requirements.
